rules.name: AI capex acceleration
rules.thesis: Sustained AI infrastructure capex can support revenue growth and pricing power for leading compute and semiconductor firms.
conditions: Management guides for rising AI-related backlog or enterprise demand.
Gross margin remains resilient while capex grows.
rules.rationale: Use this rule when the company is a direct beneficiary of AI infrastructure demand and execution quality remains strong.

rules.name: Valuation stretch under slowing growth
rules.thesis: If valuation stays elevated while growth momentum decelerates, downside risk increases materially.
conditions: Forward growth guidance is revised down.
rules.rationale: Use this rule as a cautionary overlay when expectations appear richer than operating reality.

rules.name: Balance sheet resilience
rules.thesis: Net cash, high operating cash flow, and low refinancing pressure improve resilience during drawdowns.
conditions: Net cash or modest leverage profile.
rules.rationale: This factor matters most when macro conditions tighten and investors reward durability.
